concept: A weathered, sepia-toned cartographer's map on aged, water-damaged parchment, where the intricate urban geography of Huế is overlaid with anatomical veins. It is heavily labeled in elegant, bleeding ink calligraphy, detailing both mundane streets and supernatural locations.
medium: Sepia ink and watercolor on textured, frayed parchment, detailed cartography with anatomical surrealism.

concept: A clinical, black and white schematic map resembling an acoustic frequency readout and a topographical watershed diagram. It tracks the unseen supernatural rainfall and memory erosion of the city through stark data visualization, entirely unlabeled except for symbolic waveforms.
medium: Black and white vector graphics, precise clinical linework, schematic blueprint, topographical data visualization.

concept: A full-color, impressionistic aerial landscape illustration looking down on a surreal, rain-drenched city. It captures a melancholic dream where urban architecture morphs into living tissue and ghosts, using purely symbolic color-coding and iconography to identify key locations without text.
medium: Full-color watercolor and ink wash, photorealistic base blending into surreal impressionistic anatomy, birds-eye view.
